messages.content: Aşağıdakilerden hangisi tüketicilerin satın alma karar sürecini etkileyen sosyal faktörlerden biri değildir? a. aile b. öğrenme c. kültür d. referans grupları e.roller
b. öğrenme

Aşağıdakilerden hangisi satışçılarda bulunması gereken bilgi, beceri ve yeteneklerden biri değildir?
a. Ürün bilgisi
b. Satış teknikleri
c. Fiziksel özellikler
d. Müşteri bilgisi
e. Rakip işletmeler hakkında bilgi
c. Fiziksel özellikler

Aşağıdakilerden hangisi satış sürecini etkileyen rasyonel ve psikolojik faktörler arasında yer almaz?
O a. Firma ya da satışçıya karşı beslediği kişisel duygular
O b. İhtiyaç seviyesinin düşüklüğü
O c. Kültürel nedenler
O d. Zamanın uygunsuzluğu
O e. Müşterinin satın alma kararını vermiş olması
b. Ihtiyaç seviyesinin dusuklugu.

The company had sent the advertisement to the newspaper when they realised they'd mistyped the salary they were offering for the position. Luckily, they the newspaper to correct their mistake before they printed it.
a. must have asked
O b. might have asked
O c. were able to ask
O d. were supposed to ask
O e. could have asked
e. could have asked
Please provide a question or a prompt.

A century ago, some linguists that Canada different languages in the next centuries.
O a. predicted/might have spoken
O b. was to predict/ would have spoken
O c. could predict/ could have spoken
O d. predicted / would be speaking
O e. had predicted / would speak
e. Had predicted / would speak.

You ....... the meeting this week if you are too busy. There is going to be another one next week and you ..... to that one.
O a. won't have attended/go
O b. needn't attend / can go
O c. didn't attend / used to go
O d. can't attend / have gone
e. might not attend / would go
b. Needn't attend / can go.

....... had I got out of the bank, ......... I saw the thieves running through the tunnel.
O a. Either/or
O b. Whether/or
Oc. Hardly/when
O d. Not until / but
O e. Both / and
c. Hardly/when.

The health-care reforms realized by the government, with partial support of the opposition, _____ by a majority of non-governmental organizations, ......... far from revolutionary in providing ample service, especially to the
elderly retirees.
O a. are said / to be
O b. were said to being
O c. said / to have been
O d. are said / being
O e. say / to be
a. are said / to be.

I'm sure that my new car could be more economical, ........ at the time I've been satisfied with its performance
so far.
a. therefore
O b. hence
O c but
O d. because
O e. since
e. since.

He is so poor now it's hard to believe that when he was young, he ...... sometimes his Jaguar car. down the street in his Rolls Royce or
O a. has driven
O b. has been driving
O c. may be driving
Od. would drive
O e. should have driven
d. would drive.

Society, .......... but gender roles ....... to change with it.
O a. may change/won't be expected
O b. might have changed / weren't going to expect
O c. may change / aren't expected
O d. could change / aren't expecting
e. might be changing / haven't expected
c. May change / aren't expected.

It's generally a decision by each company or cruise line ....... how many doctors or nurses to provide.
a. as to
b. in fact
c. all in all
d. by the same token
e. as regard
a. as to.
Please provide a question or a prompt.

Some of the more productive petroleum areas on Earth are found in arid and semiarid regions of Africa and the Middle East, ........ the oil fields were originally formed in shallow marine environments.
O a. in order to
O b. whatever
O c. however
O d. for fear that
e. although
e. Although.
